document.source_title: After three years of conflict, Sudan faces a deeper health crisis

claims.claim_text: Sudan accounts for the world’s largest humanitarian crisis.
claims.evidence_text: After three years of war, Sudan now accounts for the world’s largest humanitarian crisis.

claims.claim_text: Over 4 million people are estimated to be acutely malnourished in 2026.
claims.evidence_text: Over 4 million people are estimated to be acutely malnourished in 2026.

claims.claim_text: WHO has verified 217 attacks on health care since 15 April 2023.
claims.evidence_text: WHO has verified 217 attacks on health care, since 15 April 2023.

claims.claim_text: WHO-supported services have helped provide essential health care to more than 4.1 million people.
claims.evidence_text: WHO-supported services have helped provide essential health care to more than 4.1 million people.

events.event: Verification of attacks on health care
events.evidence_text: WHO has verified 217 attacks on health care, since 15 April 2023.
The most recent one was declared over in March 2026.

metrics.name: deaths from attacks on health care
children treated for malnutrition
metrics.evidence_text: WHO also supported the treatment of over 118 000 children with complicated severe acute malnutrition.

metrics.name: people reached with cholera vaccination
metrics.evidence_text: including oral cholera vaccination campaigns reaching 24.5 million people.
